pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically creates hatchery_terminal_spec.txt with these exact folder names.
setup_task.sh injects these domains as Bookmarks and lists them in hatchery_terminal_spec.txt to be removed.
setup_task.sh lists these in hatchery_terminal_spec.txt to be opened on startup.
setup_task.sh lists these domains in hatchery_terminal_spec.txt for Memory Saver exceptions.
setup_task.sh lists these IPs in hatchery_terminal_spec.txt for the Allowed insecure content list.
setup_task.sh defines custom search engines with these keywords and URL substrings in hatchery_terminal_spec.txt.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and initial Chrome bookmarks are synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. It was verified that the required bookmark folders (Environment, Fish Health, Feed Logistics, Local Sensors), unauthorized domains to purge (youtube, reddit, netflix, hulu, twitch, steampowered, facebook), startup URLs (tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov, 10.0.0.50), Memory Saver performance exceptions (10.0.0.50, 10.0.0.51, 10.0.0.52, tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov), insecure content allowed IPs (10.0.0.50, 10.0.0.51, 10.0.0.52), and custom search engines ('fb' and 'hach') explicitly match the generated specification file (hatchery_terminal_spec.txt) and verifier logic.
